themes.reasoning_notes: Cheap repeatable mill pointed at yourself stocks the graveyard efficiently for reanimator or recursion shells.
It can target any player, so it also functions as a low-volume dedicated mill piece.
One-mana artifact that mills 2 up to three times is a classic cheap graveyard-filler for recursion and reanimator shells, usually aimed at yourself.
Because it targets any player, it can contribute to mill plans, but six total cards is low impact outside dedicated support.
